description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized bust of a classical male figure, reminiscent of Greco-Roman statuary, with exaggerated, rough surface details and a dark, matte finish. The face is partially obscured by shadow, but visible are deep-set eyes with red accents, giving a dramatic and intense expression. Around the neck, a spiked collar or necklace adds a modern, edgy contrast to the otherwise classical form. The base is circular and uneven, suggesting a hand-crafted or weathered appearance. The back of the head and neck are roughly modeled, with less detail than the front, emphasizing the focus on the face and collar. The overall impression is one of a fusion between traditional sculpture and contemporary, almost punk-inspired elements.
description: A dark, rough-textured bust of a classical male figure with a spiked collar and red-accented eyes, blending traditional and modern styles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, red eye accents, and prominent spiked collar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, spiked collar, and the rough texture of the hair and neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and neck, with the spiked collar encircling the neck.
description_view_3: Right rear view showing the back of the head, collar, and the uneven base.
attribute_subject_matter: classical male bust with modern spiked collar
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is neutral and does not indicate a specific setting.
